title: impatiens messumbaensis subsp. fimbrisepala
intro: Impatiens messumbaensis subsp. fimbrisepala, also known as the Fimbri-sepala Balsam or Balsam Impatiens, is a rare and endemic plant species found in Angola. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Impatiens messumbaensis subsp. fimbrisepala include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which are used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
